criteriaResults.evidence: ToolDef.readOnly?: boolean (types.ts:37-49, JSDoc absent=>serial). readOnly:true on exactly readFileTool/globTool/grepTool in schemas.ts; bash/write_file/edit_file undefined. 2 annotation-coverage tests.

Real-timer tests measure serial vs parallel of the SAME 3x50ms batch: serial >= ~140ms (hard lower bound), parallel < serial*0.7 (self-calibrated relative comparison, anti-flake), order preserved by toolUseId regardless of completion order. Verified across 5+ runs.

Throwing middle handler -> in-slot {toolUseId, content:'Error: Tool execution failed: boom', isError:true} byte-identical to serial shape; unknown middle tool -> byte-identical unknown-tool shape incl. handler-keys ordering; never-rejects test with EVERY handler throwing; loop-level test completes stopReason 'end' despite mid-batch throw.

parallel:false -> strict input-order invocation (callOrder recorded); unmarked write-tool batch stays serial even with parallel:true; NO hard-coded tool names in agentic-loop.ts/executor.ts (grep-verified); all 10 pre-existing loop tests pass unmodified.

parallelReadOnlyTools: z.boolean().optional() (no default) on GeneratorSectionSchema; createDefaultConfig omits the key (Object.hasOwn false); generator conditional-spreads into runAgenticLoop per Sprint-3 convention; 4 wiring tests.

filesChanged.description: executeToolBatch: maximal contiguous readOnly runs via Promise.all when parallel; serial otherwise; mirrors serial success/unknown-tool/thrown-handler shapes + logger.warn byte-for-byte; results by original index; never rejects.
AgenticLoopParams.parallelReadOnlyTools?; readOnlyTools derived once from params.tools; serial for-of replaced with executeToolBatch call; ToolResultMessage append + onTurnComplete unchanged.
Conditional spread of the flag into runAgenticLoop.
9 tests: annotation coverage, concurrency proof, error containment, serial fallback.

commits: 4ab7040 - bober(sprint-4): parallel read-only tool execution via executeToolBatch
59b4b23 - bober(sprint-4): make sc-4-2 concurrency proof self-calibrated (anti-flake)
notes: MACHINE LOAD CAVEAT: shared dev machine under heavy unrelated background load (tokensave daemons, figma MCP, Adobe CC — ps-verified, none repo-related). This intermittently times out UNRELATED pre-existing tests (mcp/tools, cli memory/vault/chat, e2e cockpit, external-server-graph, onboarding-composer) at the default 5000ms. Clean full-suite runs reproduced twice with --testTimeout=20000 --hookTimeout=20000: 299 files / 3787 tests (3770 baseline + 17 new). sc-4-2 originally used a fixed absolute-ms bound, flaked once under load, replaced with same-run relative comparison in 59b4b23 (test-only commit, no production code). package.json untouched; no allow-list in loop; bash never annotated; no default for the flag anywhere.
